wif_phase_context.tilt_rationale: Phase 1 Rising + Quadrant 4 Overheat → lower equity range, overweight real assets

holdings.name: Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF
holdings.rationale: Core US equity exposure; broad market diversification across all cap sizes and sectors

holdings.name: SPDR Gold Shares
holdings.rationale: Overheat hedge; real rates rising (2.33%) makes gold attractive as store of value; geopolitical tailwind from Iran tensions

holdings.name: Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF
holdings.rationale: Late-cycle defensive equity tilt; low-vol factor outperforms in rising-rate, late-cycle environments

holdings.name: iShares Short Treasury Bond ETF
holdings.rationale: Capital preservation in short-duration Treasuries; dry powder for volatility opportunities; safe haven if risk-off intensifies

portfolio_characteristics.currency_risk: CNY/USD fluctuation; USD-strengthening favors this portfolio
portfolio_characteristics.rebalancing_frequency: Quarterly (per WIF: phase switches or every 3 weeks; simplified to quarterly for small portfolio)

execution_notes.chinese_investor_channel: QDII fund-of-funds or offshore USD brokerage (Futu, LongBridge, Interactive Brokers)
execution_notes.us_estate_tax_note: Assets < $60k exempt from US estate tax; monitor if portfolio grows beyond threshold
execution_notes.broker_availability: All 4 ETFs trade on NYSE Arca and accessible via major US/offshore brokers

scenario_sensitivity.adjustment: SPLV tilt already in place; extend duration later on rate peak

scenario_sensitivity.impact: VIX spike, oil surge, risk-off globally
scenario_sensitivity.adjustment: GLD + SHV buffer active; cash ready to deploy into equities at lower prices
Phase would shift to Phase 4 (Recover) → increase equity, reduce GLD, add TLT
Consider FX hedge if portfolio grows > ¥50k; currently negligible

data_sources.macro_indicators: FRED (DBAA, DGS10, DGS2, T10YIE, VIXCLS, VXVCLS, SP500)
data_sources.etf_information: Morningstar / Vanguard / BlackRock / Invesco fund pages
data_sources.wif_methodology: WIF v5.9 as documented in wif-fund-advisory skill

disclaimer: This is a draft advisory report for human review. WIF v5.9 backtest (2007-2026: +1332.4%, Sharpe 1.00, Max DD -21.1%) is not indicative of future results. No live-trade execution is authorized.
